text: Cylinder finally let go on the pickup arm. Pulled the baler back to the shed.
Rod seal blew. Need to replace the whole cylinder. I'll order through Amarillo.
Cylinder is ordered. Should be here midweek.
You still good for vaccination day on the 14th? Just lining up my morning.
Yes. Be at the chute by 7.
Saw the FedEx note about the delay. We still set up for the 14th?
Still set. Cylinder is a separate job from vaccination day. I'll keep you posted on the part.
Aaron — combine threw an electrical fault again. You free to swing by this week?
Aaron when you have a minute that grain auger pivot bearing I mentioned. No rush.
Need to talk hay. I got a row I cannot get to before the front. Want to trade some labor?
Will think on it. Got a busy stretch.
Loader fitting started weeping again. The one you replaced in April.
You around tomorrow? Pickup is dragging.
Do you have a spare hose end?
Vaccine day still on for the 14th?
Do you have a spare hose end?
Ok, see you at the sale barn.
